_comment: Experience capsules v4.2: UX polish — depth tiers use experience language, capability_zh explains WHY we ask + migration value, some capsule texts lowered in intimidation.

categories.hint_zh: 影响：你能否把 AI 功能上线并稳定运行
categories.hint_en: Impacts: whether you can ship AI features and keep them running

categories.label_zh: 我处理过哪些数据和交互
categories.label_en: What data and interactions I've handled
categories.hint_zh: 影响：你适合做 RAG 还是 Agent / 工具集成
categories.hint_en: Impacts: whether you'd lean toward RAG or Agent / tool integration

categories.hint_zh: 影响：你是否能做评估和回归，避免上线翻车
categories.hint_en: Impacts: whether you can evaluate and prevent quality regressions

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 应用也需要从零做到上线。你的交付经验可以直接复用。
capabilities.capability_en: AI apps also need to go from zero to production. Your shipping experience transfers directly.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 独立负责过一个用户可见功能，从开发到上线
frontend_engineer.text_en: Owned a user-facing feature from development to launch

backend_engineer.text_zh: 独立负责过一个服务或接口，从设计到上线
backend_engineer.text_en: Owned a service or API from design to launch

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 独立负责过一个端到端功能，从前端到后端到上线
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Owned an end-to-end feature from frontend through backend to launch

student.text_zh: 完整做过一个课程项目或个人项目，从零到能运行
student.text_en: Built a complete course or personal project from scratch to working state

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 工程大量复用模块（prompt 模板、工具链）。你封装复用的习惯可以迁移。
capabilities.capability_en: AI engineering heavily reuses modules (prompt templates, tool chains). Your abstraction habit transfers.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 封装过可复用的逻辑（如请求封装、Hook、工具函数）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Built reusable logic (request wrappers, hooks, utility functions)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 封装过可复用的服务模块或中间件
backend_engineer.text_en: Built reusable service modules or middleware

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 封装过跨层复用的通用逻辑（如鉴权、数据校验）
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Built cross-layer reusable logic (e.g. auth, data validation)

student.text_zh: 写过可以被别的地方直接调用的工具函数或模块
student.text_en: Written utility functions or modules reusable in other parts of the project

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 服务经常超时、返回异常格式。你处理过异常，就能更快应对。
capabilities.capability_en: AI services often time out or return unexpected formats. Your error-handling experience helps you adapt faster.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 处理过接口异常、加载失败或数据格式不对的情况
frontend_engineer.text_en: Handled API errors, loading failures, or unexpected data formats

backend_engineer.text_zh: 设计过重试、降级或熔断策略，并在线上跑过
backend_engineer.text_en: Designed retry, fallback, or circuit-breaker strategies that ran in production

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 处理过前后端各自的异常情况，并落地过方案
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Handled error scenarios on both frontend and backend, and shipped solutions

student.text_zh: 在项目里处理过报错或异常情况，而不是直接崩掉
student.text_en: Handled errors or edge cases in a project instead of letting it crash

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 系统的 bug 更隐蔽（幻觉、漂移）。你的排障直觉是核心迁移优势。
capabilities.capability_en: AI system bugs are subtler (hallucinations, drift). Your debugging instinct is a core transferable advantage.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 排查过线上问题并定位到根因（如白屏、接口超时、渲染异常）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Investigated production issues and found root causes (blank screens, API timeouts, render bugs)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 排查过线上故障并通过日志或监控定位到根因
backend_engineer.text_en: Investigated production incidents and traced root causes via logs or monitoring

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 排查过跨前后端的线上问题，定位过是前端还是后端的锅
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Debugged cross-layer production issues, pinpointing frontend vs. backend root causes

student.text_zh: debug 过比较棘手的问题，不是靠猜而是靠系统排查
student.text_en: Debugged tricky issues systematically rather than guessing

blocked_skills.reason: 传统排障工具链（DevTools/日志/堆栈）对AI幻觉几乎全部失效——幻觉是正确格式的错误答案，没有报错，不能用排障直觉直接推断质量指标能力

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 模型需要持续部署和回滚。你的自动化发布经验可以复用。
capabilities.capability_en: AI models need continuous deployment and rollback. Your automated release experience is reusable.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 配置过项目的自动构建或发布（如 GitHub Actions、Vercel）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Set up automated builds or deployments (e.g. GitHub Actions, Vercel)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 配置过服务的自动化构建、部署或容器化流程
backend_engineer.text_en: Set up automated build, deployment, or containerization for services

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 搭建过从代码到上线的完整自动化流程
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Set up end-to-end automated pipelines from code to production

student.text_zh: 把项目部署到过线上环境（如 Vercel、云服务器）
student.text_en: Deployed a project to a live environment (e.g. Vercel, cloud server)

capabilities.capability_zh: LLM 调用慢且贵，性能优化经验能帮你控制成本和延迟。
capabilities.capability_en: LLM calls are slow and expensive. Performance optimization experience helps you control cost and latency.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 做过前端性能优化（首屏加载、渲染性能、资源加载）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Done frontend performance optimization (FCP, rendering, resource loading)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 处理过并发、锁、缓存或高吞吐场景
backend_engineer.text_en: Handled concurrency, locks, caching, or high-throughput scenarios

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 做过端到端的性能优化（前端加载 + 后端响应）
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Done end-to-end performance optimization (frontend load + backend response)

student.text_zh: 优化过项目的运行速度或加载性能
student.text_en: Optimized a project's runtime speed or loading performance

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 技术变化极快。快速学习能力是迁移成功最强的预测指标。
capabilities.capability_en: AI tech changes extremely fast. Learning velocity is the strongest predictor of transition success.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 为项目主动学习并引入过新的技术方案
frontend_engineer.text_en: Proactively learned and introduced new tech into a project

backend_engineer.text_zh: 调研并落地过新的基础设施或技术方案
backend_engineer.text_en: Researched and deployed new infrastructure or tech solutions

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 为项目主动调研并引入过新的技术栈或工具
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Proactively researched and adopted new tech stacks or tools for a project

student.text_zh: 自己学过一个新技术并用它做出了可运行的项目
student.text_en: Self-learned a new technology and built a working project with it

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 对话产品大量使用流式输出。你做过实时推送，有感知优势，但 AI 流式还有边渲染边缓冲的额外挑战。
capabilities.capability_en: AI chat products heavily use streaming output. Your real-time push experience gives you a head start, though AI streaming adds rendering and buffering challenges.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 做过实时数据展示（聊天、推送、协同编辑等）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Built real-time data display (chat, push notifications, collaborative editing)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 做过实时消息推送或长连接服务（WebSocket、SSE、消息队列）
backend_engineer.text_en: Built real-time messaging, long-polling, or push services (WebSocket, SSE, MQ)

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 做过从后端推送到前端展示的实时数据链路
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Built end-to-end real-time data pipelines from backend push to frontend display

student.text_zh: 做过聊天、直播或实时更新类的项目功能
student.text_en: Built chat, live-stream, or real-time update features in a project

blocked_skills.reason: 实时数据推送（WebSocket/SSE）是单一连接推送，与多工具Agent编排（LLM动态决策调用多个工具、处理并发依赖）完全不同的能力维度

capabilities.capability_zh: 让 AI 按 JSON 格式输出，和你做数据校验的思路相通——都是「定义数据形状」。注意：你过去做的是接收端校验，AI 场景是生成端约束，方向相反但底层逻辑一样。
capabilities.capability_en: Getting AI to output structured JSON uses the same thinking as your data validation work — both are about defining data shape. Note: your experience is on the receiving end (validation), while AI structured output is on the generation end (constraints). Same logic, opposite direction.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 设计过有约束的表单校验或复杂的前端数据规则
frontend_engineer.text_en: Designed constrained form validation or complex frontend data rules

backend_engineer.text_zh: 设计过接口的输入输出校验规则或数据约束
backend_engineer.text_en: Designed API input/output validation rules or data constraints

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 设计过前后端一致的数据校验或约束规则
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Designed consistent data validation rules across frontend and backend

student.text_zh: 写过对用户输入做检查和限制的逻辑
student.text_en: Written logic to validate and constrain user input

blocked_skills.reason: 接收端数据校验（Joi/Zod约束输入）≠Function Calling的工具schema设计（让LLM决定调用哪个工具并生成参数）——方向和控制权完全相反

capabilities.capability_zh: RAG 的核心是把文档变成 AI 能理解的格式，本质就是数据清洗和转换。
capabilities.capability_en: The core of RAG is converting documents into AI-readable formats — essentially data cleaning and transformation.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 处理过文件解析、数据清洗或格式转换
frontend_engineer.text_en: Done file parsing, data cleaning, or format conversion

backend_engineer.text_zh: 做过批量数据处理、ETL 或数据清洗
backend_engineer.text_en: Done batch data processing, ETL, or data cleaning

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 处理过从上传到解析到入库的数据流
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Handled data flows from upload to parsing to storage

student.text_zh: 处理过文件读写、数据格式转换或简单数据分析
student.text_en: Done file I/O, format conversion, or simple data analysis

capabilities.capability_zh: AI Agent 本质是多步骤状态机。你设计过的业务流程就是同一种能力。
capabilities.capability_en: AI Agents are essentially multi-step state machines. The business flows you've designed are the same capability.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 设计过有多个步骤或状态的页面流程（如多步表单、审批流）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Designed multi-step or multi-state page flows (wizards, approval flows)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 设计过有多个阶段的业务流程或状态机
backend_engineer.text_en: Designed multi-stage business processes or state machines

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 设计过跨前后端的多步业务流程
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Designed multi-step business flows spanning frontend and backend

student.text_zh: 做过有多个步骤的交互流程（如注册、下单、问卷）
student.text_en: Built multi-step interaction flows (registration, checkout, survey)

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 应用的核心是调用 LLM API 并处理返回。你对接外部 API 的经验直接适用。
capabilities.capability_en: AI apps revolve around calling LLM APIs and handling responses. Your API integration experience applies directly.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 集成过第三方 API 或 SDK，并处理过数据适配和异常
frontend_engineer.text_en: Integrated third-party APIs or SDKs, handling data adaptation and errors

backend_engineer.text_zh: 对接过外部系统的 API，处理过认证、限流和异常
backend_engineer.text_en: Integrated external system APIs, handling auth, rate limiting, and errors

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 集成过外部 API，处理过从请求到展示的完整数据链路
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Integrated external APIs, handling the full data chain from request to display

student.text_zh: 调用过第三方 API（如地图、天气、AI 接口）
student.text_en: Called third-party APIs (e.g. maps, weather, AI services)

blocked_skills.reason: 调用外部API（你决定何时调用、传什么参数）≠Function Calling（LLM自主决定调用哪个工具、生成参数）——控制权从开发者转移到模型，是根本不同的交互模式

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 需要结构化的知识和数据。你组织数据结构的经验可以迁移到知识库建设。
capabilities.capability_en: AI needs structured knowledge and data. Your data structuring experience transfers to knowledge base construction.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 设计过复杂的前端数据结构或状态模型（如 store 设计、缓存策略）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Designed complex frontend data structures or state models (store design, caching)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 做过数据库表设计、查询优化或数据模型演进
backend_engineer.text_en: Done database schema design, query optimization, or data model evolution

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 设计过接口数据模型或数据库结构
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Designed API data models or database schemas

student.text_zh: 处理过课程项目里的数据结构组织或存储方案
student.text_en: Organized data structures or storage approaches in course projects

blocked_skills.reason: 关系型数据库查询优化（索引/执行计划）≠向量召回重排（BM25+向量两段式检索、reranker模型打分）——底层机制和工具链完全不同

capabilities.capability_zh: AI Agent 需要跨轮对话管理状态。你管理复杂状态的经验是直接优势。
capabilities.capability_en: AI Agents need to manage state across conversation turns. Your complex state management experience is a direct advantage.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 管理过复杂的页面状态或跨组件数据同步
frontend_engineer.text_en: Managed complex page state or cross-component data synchronization

backend_engineer.text_zh: 设计过服务之间的数据流转或分布式状态管理
backend_engineer.text_en: Designed inter-service data flow or distributed state management

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 设计过前后端之间的数据状态同步方案
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Designed data state synchronization between frontend and backend

student.text_zh: 管理过项目里多个页面或模块之间共享的数据
student.text_en: Managed data shared across multiple pages or modules in a project

blocked_skills.reason: 跨组件状态同步（应用数据的确定性存取）≠向量检索（高维向量的近似最近邻搜索）——两者毫无关系，是历史上损害用户信任度最高的硬凑映射

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 输出不确定，评估比传统测试更重要。你的测试习惯是好的起点。
capabilities.capability_en: AI outputs are non-deterministic, making evaluation even more important than traditional testing. Your testing habit is a strong starting point.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 写过测试来验证代码行为（不限形式，手动脚本也算）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Written tests to verify code behavior (any form, even manual scripts)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 写过自动化测试（单测或集成测试）
backend_engineer.text_en: Written automated tests (unit or integration tests)

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 写过覆盖前后端的自动化测试
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Written automated tests covering both frontend and backend

student.text_zh: 给自己的代码写过测试用例
student.text_en: Written test cases for your own code

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 模型升级后效果可能变差。你防止回退的经验可以迁移到模型评估。
capabilities.capability_en: AI model upgrades can degrade quality. Your regression prevention experience transfers to model evaluation.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 做过防止代码改坏已有功能的检查（如 CI、code review）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Done checks to prevent code changes from breaking existing features (CI, code review)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 在 CI 中跑过自动化回归检查或集成验证
backend_engineer.text_en: Run automated regression checks or integration validation in CI

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 在 CI 中跑过前后端的自动化回归检查
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Run automated regression checks across frontend and backend in CI

student.text_zh: 用过 GitHub Actions 或类似工具自动跑检查
student.text_en: Used GitHub Actions or similar tools to run automated checks

capabilities.capability_zh: AI 产品需要用数据判断效果好不好。你看数据做决策的经验可以复用。
capabilities.capability_en: AI products need data to judge quality. Your data-driven decision-making experience is reusable.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 用过埋点或监控数据做过分析决策
frontend_engineer.text_en: Used analytics or monitoring data to inform decisions

backend_engineer.text_zh: 用过监控指标或日志数据做过性能或稳定性决策
backend_engineer.text_en: Used monitoring metrics or log data for performance or stability decisions

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 用过监控或埋点数据做过分析决策
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Used monitoring or analytics data to inform decisions

student.text_zh: 根据数据或日志分析过项目里的问题
student.text_en: Analyzed issues in a project based on data or logs

ai_exploration.hint_zh: 如果你已经开始探索 AI，这些帮我们判断得更准
ai_exploration.hint_en: If you've started exploring AI, these help us calibrate better

capsules.capability_zh: 你已经在用 AI 辅助工作，说明你对 AI 的交互模式不陌生。
capsules.capability_en: You already use AI at work, which means AI interaction patterns aren't new to you.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 用 AI 工具完成过实际工作任务（写代码、改文案、生成测试等）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Used AI tools to complete real work tasks (writing code, editing copy, generating tests)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 用 AI 工具完成过实际工作任务（写代码、排查问题、生成配置等）
backend_engineer.text_en: Used AI tools to complete real work tasks (writing code, debugging, generating configs)

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 用 AI 工具完成过实际工作任务（写代码、设计方案、生成文档等）
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Used AI tools to complete real work tasks (writing code, designing solutions, generating docs)

student.text_zh: 用 AI 工具完成过课程作业或项目任务
student.text_en: Used AI tools to complete coursework or project tasks

capsules.capability_zh: 你已经在项目中调用过 AI 能力，这是最直接的迁移信号。
capsules.capability_en: You've already called AI capabilities in a project — this is the most direct transition signal.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 在项目里接过 LLM 能力（如对话、摘要、翻译）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Integrated LLM capabilities in a project (e.g. chat, summarization, translation)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 在后端接过 LLM API 或搭过 AI 服务
backend_engineer.text_en: Integrated LLM APIs or built AI services on the backend

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 在项目里接过 LLM 能力并做到前端可用
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Integrated LLM capabilities and exposed them through the frontend

student.text_zh: 在项目里调用过 AI/LLM 的 API
student.text_en: Called AI/LLM APIs in a project

capsules.capability_zh: Prompt 工程的核心就是反复调整指令。你已经有这个习惯了。
capsules.capability_en: The core of prompt engineering is iterating on instructions. You already have this habit.

frontend_engineer.text_zh: 调过 prompt 让 AI 输出符合预期（如格式、风格、准确度）
frontend_engineer.text_en: Iterated on prompts to get AI output that met expectations (format, style, accuracy)

backend_engineer.text_zh: 调过 prompt 让 AI 输出符合预期（如 JSON 格式、准确抽取）
backend_engineer.text_en: Iterated on prompts to get AI output that met expectations (JSON format, accurate extraction)

fullstack_engineer.text_zh: 调过 prompt 让 AI 输出符合预期（如结构化数据、可用内容）
fullstack_engineer.text_en: Iterated on prompts to get AI output that met expectations (structured data, usable content)

student.text_zh: 调整过提问方式让 AI 给出更好的回答
student.text_en: Adjusted prompts to get better answers from AI

confirm_skills.explain_zh: 把文档变成向量，做语义相似搜索
confirm_skills.explain_en: Convert documents to vectors for semantic similarity search

confirm_skills.explain_zh: 设计指令结构让模型按要求输出
confirm_skills.explain_en: Design instruction structure for AI to output as required

confirm_skills.explain_zh: 让模型在对话中调用外部工具或 API
confirm_skills.explain_en: Let the model call external tools or APIs during conversation

_ranking_note: Capsules are ranked by prior × migration_value (descending) within each category. migration_value measures how much this capability predicts AI transition success. prior measures how likely this role has this experience. The product balances 'what's worth asking' with 'what's likely answerable'.
